title: Install CNG fuel systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install CNG fuel systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to install CNG fuel system

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 CNG fuel system installation information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Installation options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 CNG fuel system installation information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Installation options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 CNG fuel system installation information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Installation options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to install CNG fuel system

elements.title: Carry out installation activities

pcs.text: CNG fuel system is checked for correct application and components are checked for damage2.2 CNG fuel system components are installed according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, safety and environmental requirements and AS/NZS 2739 Natural gas (NG) fuel systems for vehicle engines, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Installed CNG fuel system is tested for correct operation and required adjustments are made according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and AS/NZS 2739
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can CNG fuel system is checked for correct application and components are checked for damage2.2 CNG fuel system components are installed according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, safety and environmental requirements and AS/NZS 2739 Natural gas (NG) fuel systems for vehicle engines, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Installed CNG fuel system is tested for correct operation and required adjustments are made according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and AS/NZS 2739?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can CNG fuel system is checked for correct application and components are checked for damage2.2 CNG fuel system components are installed according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, safety and environmental requirements and AS/NZS 2739 Natural gas (NG) fuel systems for vehicle engines, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Installed CNG fuel system is tested for correct operation and required adjustments are made according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety requirements, and AS/NZS 2739.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out installation activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and system is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and system is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and system is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
